characters.description: The wearer of Journey and a leading member of House Winterscar. Keith shares a secured warning with his sister Kidra and follows its clues toward a seeker, Mites, and a weapon that Relinquished concealed but could not destroy.
characters.name: Keith Winterscar

characters.description: Keith's sister and trusted confidante, closely involved in the risks surrounding his discoveries. Kidra accepts the danger of hearing his secured message because she believes her earlier involvement has already made her a target.
characters.name: Kidra

characters.description: Keith's Relic armor and protected archive, worn as he follows the recording's lead. Its connection to a recovered seeker makes it part of the trail he is following, though its safeguards limit what it will reveal even to him.
characters.name: Journey

characters.description: An ancient machine power opposed by the unidentified sender of Keith's recording. The warning places Relinquished at the center of the conflict surrounding the seeker, Mites, and a weapon that was hidden but could not be destroyed.
characters.name: Relinquished

characters.description: An unidentified digital investigator who sends Keith a secured message. The sender claims a long struggle against Relinquished and directs attention to a seeker, Mites, and an old weapon that the machine power concealed but failed to destroy.
characters.name: the digital researcher

characters.description: A Deathless clan lord who accompanies Keith and Kidra to a concealed Indagata Mortis archive. After its occult contents are uncovered, Atius orders Keith to investigate them and report directly to him.
characters.name: Atius

characters.description: A pilot who continues to treat Keith with easy familiarity even after his new standing as a Relic Knight makes ordinary scavengers deferential.
characters.name: Keith's pilot friend

characters.description: The father of Keith and Kidra, held as a captive soul by a machine commander serving Relinquished. His memories give his captor the knowledge needed to locate House Winterscar.
characters.name: Tenisent

characters.description: A machine champion serving under Relinquished and subject to its coercive discipline. After an earlier failure, To’Aacar is ordered to capture Keith, destroy the black box he carries, and pursue an operation against Keith's clan.
characters.name: To’Aacar

characters.description: A Feather placed in command of a machine army bound for Undecider City. New to warfare, she begins asking the machines under her command about fear and desire while using Tenisent's captive soul for information.
characters.name: the Feather machine commander

characters.description: The commander of a pirate force captured by Atius. The captain warns that raiders and slavers are preparing to attack the clan, then promises substantial pirate support in return for the eventual restoration of three seized relic armors.
characters.name: the pirate captain

characters.description: A House Shadowsong candidate who receives one of the relic armors taken from captured pirates. She is one of three new armor recipients whose equipment remains tied to Atius's bargain with the pirate force.
characters.name: Anka Shadowsong

characters.description: A Shadowsong retainer who receives captured pirate relic armor alongside Anka Shadowsong. Locke is a distinct member of the newly equipped group, and the armor remains a conditional asset tied to preparations for an approaching attack.
characters.name: Locke

characters.description: An unnamed Shadowsong retainer who receives the third relic armor taken from the captured pirates. The armor is to be returned after the coming battle under Atius's agreement with the pirate captain.
characters.name: the second Shadowsong retainer

characters.description: A mechanically altered woman who advises the Feather on Undecider City. An implanted unity fractal leaves her subject to Relinquished's control, and she proposes breaking the city through blockade, deprivation, and conversion.
characters.name: the Chosen leader

characters.description: An experienced runner who advises the Feather's command group. The runner challenges the belief that Undecider City will surrender without inflicting serious losses on the besieging machines.
characters.name: the old runner

characters.description: The inherited relic armor worn by Kidra and associated with House Winterscar. Its return establishes her publicly as a Relic Knight alongside Keith, giving the restored house two armored members when the siblings arrive home.
characters.name: Winterscar Prime

characters.description: A senior reacher in Clan Altosk's hangar with a longstanding personal connection to Keith and Kidra. Anarii recognizes Keith after initially mistaking the armored arrival for a visiting crusader and witnesses the siblings' changed standing.
characters.name: Anarii

characters.description: The figure associated with an orbital fortress whose discharge restores the expedition's depleted power cells during its onward journey.
characters.name: Talon

characters.description: A former wearer of Journey seen in historical records as an elite Indagata Mortis crusader of the Solaris Imperium. Her recorded service links her to an order preparing humanity for a war against machines.
characters.name: Journey's former crusader

characters.description: A senior Shadowsong knight who distrusts House Winterscar's account of Kidra's new combat ability and questions whether the claim can be trusted.
characters.name: the Shadowsong Prime

characters.description: A religious leader who arrives with machine-aligned Undersider refugees and twenty-three Chosen knights. He says the Chosen can move through the underground without being attacked by machines.
characters.name: the Chosen priest

characters.description: The Chosen priest's logistics and administrative deputy, with responsibilities distinct from the group's religious leadership. The captain objects when the priest commits every Chosen knight to a dangerous mission against the raiders' staging grounds.
characters.name: the Chosen captain

characters.description: The guard captain of House Winterscar, supporting Keith as he administers the house while Kidra is away on a diplomatic mission.
characters.name: the House Winterscar captain

characters.description: A longtime friend from Keith's earlier social circle who has learned to navigate the colony's status-conscious society. She reconnects with him at a dance, where his new rank, obligations, and constant danger expose the strain in their old relationship.
characters.name: Ellie

characters.description: The commander of the slaver knights attacking House Winterscar. The leader survives the defenders' counterattack and escapes the estate.
characters.name: the slaver leader
